programs.title: Jhanak
programs.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programs.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programs.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programs.title: Love By Force
programs.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programs.title: Aankh Micholi
programs.desc: A family of misfits tries to get their daughter married to a well-settled NRI before he learns that she suffers from a problem. They go out of their way to conceal the truth—only to realize that he too has a big secret! Umesh Shukla.

programs.title: No One Killed Jessica
programs.desc: Journalist, Meera teams up with Sabrina Lall whose sister has been murdered by the son of a Congress party Member of Parliament in Haryana. As Meera gets interested in the case, she wants to bring justice to her case. Rani Mukerji, Vidya Balan, Myra Karn, Neil Bhoopalam, Rajesh Sharma, Raj Kumar Gupta, Raj Kumar Gupta.

programs.title: My Captive
programs.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.
